title: Classic British Gouda Casserole
description: A rich and comforting casserole featuring melted gouda cheese and a blend of British flavors.
instructions: Thaw the pastry dough according to package instructions.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the gouda cheese, casserole mix, spices, and milk. Stir until well combined.
Add the eggs to the cheese mixture and stir until smooth.
Roll out the pastry dough to fit a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Pour the cheese mixture into the pastry-lined dish.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
